description:
SK Telecom’s Cloud Management Platform (CMP) is end-to-end B2B cloud management service providing account, contract, billing, product management services running on AWS. This is consist of billing solution, market place and big data analytics services based on Machine Learning. Learn why SK Telecom’s CMP chose AWS Fargate, Amazon Elasticache for Redis, Amazon RDS for web, API, visualization layer and how they used Amazon SageMaker for cost and invoice analysis using anomaly detection.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​ cloud: 
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO​

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: SK Telecom: End-to-End Cloud Management Platform on AWS (Korean)
